name: diagIsValidValue
title: diagIsValidValue
syntax: long diagIsValidValue( diagResponse response, char[] parameterQualifier, long[] errorLevelOut);
description: Returns 1 if the parameter in the response object is valid, otherwise 0 is returned and the level of the problem (error or warning) is set in the output parameter field.

parameters.name: response
parameters.description: The response object where the parameter is searched

parameters.name: parameterQualifier
parameters.description: The qualifier of the parameter that is checked

parameters.name: errorLevelOut
parameters.description: Return value if parameter could be checked: errorLevelOut[0]:0: Value is valid1: Warning2: Error

availability: Online mode Not for basic diagnostics
Online mode Not for basic diagnostics
